hooks.command: RULES_FILE="$HOME/Dev/nexus/shared/absolute_rules.json"; [ -f "$RULES_FILE" ] && /usr/bin/python3 -c "import json; f=open('$HOME/Dev/nexus/shared/absolute_rules.json'); d=json.load(f); rs=d.get('common',[]); cs=[r for r in rs if r.get('level') in ('🔴','⛔','★')]; print('{\"systemMessage\":\"[절대규칙] '+' | '.join(r['id']+': '+r['rule'] for r in cs[:8])+'\"}')"
